76 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
Venus is with Jupiter and Mercury in the south. and Saturn in the
East. Other words all the plants are in the second to Saturn (in
successive way). lst is east next is south south (as per directional
aspects)-Hence the native enjoys tremondous wealth and fortune
through wife, but happiness and amiability in family life is poor.
Besides the native's wife will be a chronic patient because of
VENUS+DRAGON
TAIL+MARS+MOON+JUPITER+MERCURY.
